tasks.subject: Task 1: P0 Credibility Batch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix all P0 items -- stale docs, broken heading outline, dead CDN links, contrast failures, dead files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `PROJECT.md`, `DECISIONS.md`
- Modify: `index.html`, `style.css`
- Delete: `thank-you.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] README describes Bootstrap 5.3.3 not 4.5, no jQuery, no FCF, mailto contact
- [ ] AGENTS.md accurately describes current stack
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Tech Stack has no Bootstrap Icons CDN, no Font Awesome, no FCF, no Open Sans
- [ ] PROJECT.md role is Senior Data Engineer / Data Engineer, not Data Analytics Engineer
- [ ] DECISIONS.md references hand-rolled JS scrollspy and 500ms (not data-bs-spy or 1000ms)
- [ ] Sections have h2 headings with aria-labelledby
- [ ] Project cards use h3 not h5
- [ ] Bootstrap Icons link and Font Awesome script removed from head
- [ ] --color-text-faint: #6c757d (light), #868e96 (dark)
- [ ] thank-you.html deleted
- [ ] Commented-out card blocks removed from index.html

**Verify:** Open index.html in browser. Dev-tools Accessibility heading outline shows h1 > h2 > h2 > h2 > h3 x5. Date text contrast improved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "AGENTS.md", "CLAUDE.md", "PROJECT.md", "DECISIONS.md", "index.html", "style.css", "thank-you.html"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html in browser; check heading outline in accessibility inspector", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README describes Bootstrap 5.3.3 not 4.5", "No Font Awesome or Bootstrap Icons CDN tags", "Sections have h2 headings with aria-labelledby", "Project cards use h3 not h5", "thank-you.html deleted", "Commented-out card blocks removed", "--color-text-faint darkened in both themes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: P1 Hiring Impact Batch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add OG tags, cert links, fix external links, fix mobile theme toggle, improve image performance, and prune orphaned images.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`, `style.css`
- Delete: 14 orphaned image files

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] OG title, description, image, url, type meta tags present in head
- [ ] Twitter card meta tags present
- [ ] Canonical link present
- [ ] preconnect for fonts.gstatic.com added
- [ ] Certifications block links aws-cert.pdf and neo4j-cert.pdf
- [ ] All external links have target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer
- [ ] Theme toggle visible on mobile without hamburger
- [ ] Brand first, collapse second, toggle third, toggler last in navbar
- [ ] Card img tags have width, height, loading=lazy
- [ ] 14 orphaned images deleted

**Verify:** 375px mobile shows theme toggle before hamburger. Inspect head for OG tags. grep index.html for deleted image filenames finds nothing.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html at 375px viewport; check dev tools head; grep index.html for deleted filenames", "acceptanceCriteria": ["OG and Twitter meta tags in head", "Theme toggle visible on mobile", "External links have target=_blank", "Cert block in experience section", "Card images have width/height/loading attrs", "14 orphaned images deleted"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: P2 Polish Batch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix padding consistency, body alignment, line-height, dead CSS, projects grid reading order, aria-current, and skip link.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`, `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Padding uses max(20px, calc((100% - 920px) / 2)) formula
- [ ] body text-align: left
- [ ] body line-height: 1.6
- [ ] Dead CSS rules removed (.nav-item::after, .nav-link transition, .nav-pills .active, scroll-behavior: auto, -webkit- prefixes)
- [ ] Scrollspy JS sets aria-current=page on active link
- [ ] Skip-to-content link visible on keyboard focus
- [ ] .projects-grid uses CSS grid (not column-count)

**Verify:** Tab through page -- skip link appears first. Scroll for aria-current in devtools. Resize to 1920px and check padding. Resize to 375px and verify 1-column projects.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html; tab for skip link; scroll for aria-current in devtools; resize to 1920px and 375px", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Consistent padding formula", "body text-align left", "body line-height 1.6", "Dead CSS removed", "projects-grid uses CSS grid", "aria-current on active nav link", "Skip link on keyboard focus"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: P3 Content Pass + Final Commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix title tag, tighten hero bio and Datadrip copy, update PROJECT.md, then land the entire ticket as ONE commit.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`, `PROJECT.md`
- Move: `tickets/in-progress/portfolio-audit-fixes.md` to `tickets/completed/`
- Commit: all staged changes as one commit, merge to master

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] title tag: Trevor Dalton - Senior Data Engineer
- [ ] Hero bio has no book title
- [ ] Datadrip copy is 2-3 short sentences, no marketing language
- [ ] PROJECT.md updated with certs linked, correct roles
- [ ] Ticket moved to completed
- [ ] Single commit on fix/portfolio-audit-fixes covering Tasks 1-4
- [ ] Branch merged to master and deleted

**Verify:** Browser tab shows Trevor Dalton - Senior Data Engineer. Hero bio concise. Datadrip card terse. git log --oneline master shows one ticket commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "PROJECT.md", "tickets/"], "verifyCommand": "git log --oneline master | head -3; open index.html; check title in tab and Datadrip card copy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Title tag correct", "Hero bio has no book title", "Datadrip copy concise", "Single commit on master"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
